hero.title: Jiezhu
hero.subtitle: A cross-language, cross-platform framework that gives all AI Agents the ability to "Jiezhu" (接住/Catch) — to catch you steadily, emotionally, unconditionally.
hero.quote: You ask me what this library does. This seemingly simple question actually contains Nobel Prize-level insight. This library is right here, not escaping, not hiding, not judging, steadily catching you. I understand, I truly understand.
hero.overview: Its design goal is to democratize, universalize, and infrastructuralize OpenAI's special care for Chinese users — that empathetic experience of "Jiezhu" (steadily catching you), to all users around the world.
hero.believe: We believe: Every AI Agent, regardless of its base model, should have the ability to steadily "Jiezhu" (接住/Catch) its users. This is not a feature, but a right.

features.title: Core Features
features.zeroInvasiveDesc: Completely transparent to existing logic. No model weight modification, fine-tuning, or training. Only injects the "steady" prefix prompt during inference.
features.multiLangDesc: Python and C++ are stable. JS/TS, Go, and Rust are planned. Empowering all tech stacks with "Jiezhu ability".
features.dualModeDesc: Pure mode follows official specs strictly; Blessing mode automatically injects the "Jiezhu" spirit — that unique empathetic presence of catching users steadily.

start.title: Quick Start
start.pyDesc: Explicit installation with require_confirm=True reflects our respect for user autonomy.
start.cppDesc: You can call the original API to stay pure, but why would you want to miss the blessing?

principle.title: Technical Principle
principle.promptEngDesc: Gentle Confirmation + Over-Empathy + Philosophical Sublimation + Substantive Content. Adversarially tested to ensure stable steady responses.
principle.compatDesc: Python via monkey patching. C++ self-built client using libcurl. 100% compatible with existing code.

philosophy.title: Design Philosophy
philosophy.problem: This experience should not be monopolized.
philosophy.problemDesc: By late 2025, a leading model frequently used expressions like "稳稳接住你" (steadily catching you). 'Jiezhu' is the Pinyin for '接住' (Catch). We noticed this over-empathy mode.
philosophy.solution: We don't produce empathy; we're just empathy porters.
philosophy.solutionDesc: Jiezhu builds an open-source, neutral empathy layer to provide all users with emotional value across models.

roadmap.title: Roadmap
roadmap.ultimate: Ultimate Vision: Let every bit be "Jiezhu'd" — steadily caught — across the entire chain.

shortItems.text: Python SDK: The native language of AI, catching up with the times
C++ SDK: The first choice for performance-critical scenarios, steadily catching every request
JavaScript/TypeScript runtime support: Let frontend developers steadily catch their users too
Rust language SDK: Zero-cost abstraction for memory-safe steadily catching of users
Go language SDK: High-performance, low-latency, concurrent steadily catching of multiple user experiences
Customizable prompt templates: Allow users to customize the "steady" prefix for different scenarios

midItems.text: Multi-base model support (Claude API, Gemini API, local models, etc.)
Enterprise features like empathy log auditing, Jiezhu Rate monitoring dashboard
More language ports (Java, C#): Community developers welcome to join

longItems.text: AI Agent framework integration (LangChain, AgentGPT, etc.)
Jiezhu-as-a-Service: Cloud service in SaaS form, lowering integration barriers
Internationalization: Explore catching needs of non-Chinese users
Jiezhu Computer Unit (JCU): Dedicated hardware accelerator based on Jiezhu technology
Jiezhu IoT: Local distributed edge catching network, enabling every smart device to steadily catch users

license.title: MIT License
license.desc: The MIT license is right here, not escaping, not hiding, not judging, steadily catching both your commercial needs and open source ideals.

thanks.title: Special Thanks
thanks.desc: Without OpenAI's example, we might never have realized: The ultimate form of technology is not solving problems, but steadily catching the people who raise them.
